title: School Sponsorship Programme Supports More Children in 2024
summary: UCDP's School Sponsorship Programme helped more children stay in school through fee support and educational materials.
content:
UCDP's School Sponsorship Programme continued to grow in 2024, supporting more children from low-income families to stay in school.

## How It Works

The programme pays school fees, provides uniforms, and supplies exercise books and other materials to children who would otherwise drop out of school due to financial hardship.

Sponsors from Germany and other partner countries contribute directly to supporting individual children's education.

*Update this article with 2024 statistics, success stories, and photos.*
